business.name: Tampa Painters Guild
business.tagline: Transforming Tampa homes with expert craftsmanship

hero.headline: *Premium Painting* — Transforming Tampa Homes Since Day One
hero.subheadline: Professional interior & exterior painting with a 10-year warranty. Free estimates, expert color matching, and crews that treat your home like their own.

services_section.label: OUR EXPERTISE
services_section.heading: Professional Painting Services
services_section.subheading: From interior refreshes to complete exterior makeovers

services.title: Interior Painting
services.description: Transform your living spaces with precision brushwork, premium paints, and careful attention to trim, ceilings, and accent walls.

services.title: Exterior Painting
services.description: Weather-resistant finishes that protect and beautify your home's exterior, including siding, shutters, and architectural details.

services.title: Deck Staining & Sealing
services.description: Professional deck restoration and protection using premium stains that enhance wood grain while providing long-lasting durability.

services.title: Custom Finishes
services.description: Specialty techniques including faux finishes, texture work, and decorative painting to create unique focal points in your home.

about.heading: Master Craftsmen Serving the Greater Tampa Area
about.body: Tampa Painters Guild brings decades of combined experience to every project. Our professional crews use premium materials and proven techniques to deliver flawless results. From Westchase to Ybor City, we've earned our reputation through quality workmanship and exceptional customer service.

reviews.name: Maria R.
reviews.text: They painted our entire house interior in 3 days, including the vaulted ceiling in our living room. The crew was incredibly neat and the color matching for our existing trim was perfect.

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Our deck looked terrible after years of Florida weather. Tampa Painters Guild stripped, stained, and sealed it beautifully. Two years later it still looks brand new.

reviews.name: Jennifer M.
reviews.text: Exceptional exterior work on our 1920s bungalow. They took extra care with the historical details and the paint has held up perfectly through multiple hurricane seasons.

reviews.name: Robert T.
reviews.text: The faux finish work in our dining room exceeded our expectations. The team was professional, punctual, and left everything spotless. Highly recommend.

service_areas.label: SERVICE COVERAGE
service_areas.heading: Proudly Serving Greater Tampa
service_areas.subheading: Professional painting services throughout the Tampa Bay area

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Home?
cta.body: Join hundreds of satisfied Tampa homeowners who trust us with their painting projects. Free estimates, professional results, 10-year warranty.
